# brightcap — Cambridge Property Co-Investment

> brightcap acquires residential blocks in Cambridge in selective partnership with sophisticated co-investors.

## About brightcap

brightcap is a property co-investment platform focused exclusively on Cambridge, UK. We acquire residential blocks in one of the world's most resilient property markets — a city built to thrive in the AI era.

## Our Thesis

AI is accelerating the economic growth of a small number of cities — and leaving others behind. That's not a cycle — it's a shift. The cities at the centre of it will attract talent, capital and opportunity for decades — driving long-term rental demand and property values in the process. The market hasn't priced this in yet. We've built our strategy around it.

## Why Cambridge

Cambridge is home to one of the world's most concentrated AI ecosystems. With world-class research, a deep talent pipeline, and structural supply constraints, it offers a rare combination of long-term demand drivers and limited housing supply. brightcap focuses on acquiring residential blocks in Cambridge — targeting value-add opportunities in a market with strong fundamentals.

## What We Acquire

We target residential blocks in Cambridge that offer value-add potential through refurbishment, reconfiguration, or improved management. Our construction partner has operated in Cambridge for over 25 years.

## The Founders

- **Andy Fidler** — Decades of experience building and scaling businesses. £5.7M property portfolio. Featured in BBC, The Telegraph, and multiple property industry publications. Winner of 20+ UK & Global property and business awards.
- **Sam Carter** — Co-founder with combined 34 years of experience across property and business.

brightcap is built on a simple conviction: the right location, the right thesis, and the right local partnerships matter more than financial engineering.

## Investor Profile

We partner with sophisticated, high-net-worth individuals who are looking to co-invest in Cambridge residential property. Typical investment amounts range from £250k to £3m+.

## Featured In

BBC, The Telegraph, Landlord Today, Landlord Zone, NRLA, Property Notify, Property Entrepreneur, Property Investor Awards.

## Contact

Book a partner investor call — a 30-minute call to understand your goals, walk you through our Cambridge block strategy, and explore whether there's a genuine fit.

Website: https://cambridge-capital-flow.lovable.app
